title: Teque Cedar Shrimp Skewers
description: A flavorful and light dish combining the smokiness of cedar with the spiciness of Teque and the sweetness of Ukrainian cuisine. Perfect for a quick summer dinner.

ingredients.name: Teque seasoning
ingredients.notes: Or substitute with paprika and chili flakes

ingredients.name: Cedar wood chips
ingredients.notes: Soaked in water for at least 30 minutes

instructions: Soak cedar wood chips in water for at least 30 minutes.
Thread shrimp onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush skewers with olive oil and season with Teque seasoning.
Place skewers on the grill and cook for 2-3 minutes per side, or until pink and cooked through.
Remove skewers from the grill and brush with lemon juice.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve immediately.
